name: Impossible Ham and Swiss Pie
recipeIngredient: 2 cups Ham; cooked, smoked and cut up
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 400°F.
2. Grease a 10x1 1/2 inch pie plate.
3. Sprinkle the ham, cheese, and onions in the plate.
4. In a blender or with a hand beater, beat the remaining ingredients together until smooth for 15 seconds.
5. Pour the mixture into the plate.
6. Bake until golden brown or until a knife inserted in the center comes out clean, about 35 to 40 minutes.
7. Allow to cool for 5 minutes.
